purpose: Gate 2 source-reality matrix for earthquake-only audit scope choices in the Philippines Building Code Evidence Auditor.

scope_reality.question: Is there public target-specific evidence that this building was designed or reviewed for NSCP earthquake or seismic requirements?
primary_source_types: signed and sealed structural design analysis or computations
approved civil/structural plans or permit attachments

example_sources.name: DILG-DPWH-DICT-DTI JMC No. 2018-01
example_sources.access_notes: Public process context for permits and occupancy; not a target-specific NSCP compliance record.

example_sources.name: Pasay City Building Permit Application PDF
example_sources.access_notes: Names structural design analysis, computations, and related OBO requirements; not target-specific proof.

expected_public_result_shape: target-specific official or professional document found
manual OBO, owner/operator, or engineer request needed
limitations: Generic standards context cannot prove building-specific NSCP compliance.
Missing public documents do not prove noncompliance or unsafe conditions.
manual_follow_up_triggers: no public target-specific structural design analysis found
no public OBO record saying civil/structural plans or computations were reviewed
target is a complex and the exact tower, wing, or affected portion is unclear

scope_reality.question: Is there public target-specific evidence that this building went through official OBO structural permit or plan-review processing?
primary_source_types: certificate of occupancy referencing issued permit or approved structural scope

example_sources.name: DILG-DPWH-DICT-DTI JMC No. 2018-01
example_sources.access_notes: Explains official building permit and occupancy process; target records are usually manual.

example_sources.name: Muntinlupa Civil/Structural Permit PDF
example_sources.access_notes: Shows civil/structural permit language and conformity context; not a record for another target.

expected_public_result_shape: target-specific OBO permit or review record found
manual OBO or owner/operator request needed
not_enough_if_only_found: order of payment without issued permit
certificate of occupancy without relevant permit or structural scope reference
limitations: An application form is not an issued permit.
An issued permit record is document evidence, not a current safety certification.
manual_follow_up_triggers: no issued building permit or civil/structural permit is public
certificate of occupancy does not reference structural scope

scope_reality.question: After a specific earthquake, what is the official tag or inspection status for this building?
primary_source_types: DPWH rapid visual screening placard or report
official rapid assessment list or report

example_sources.name: Davao City red/yellow tag announcement
example_sources.access_notes: Official Davao City source for red/yellow tag process and affected-building status language.

example_sources.name: DPWH Department Order No. 027 s. 2023
example_sources.access_notes: Defines rapid visual screening and green/yellow/red placard terminology.

expected_public_result_shape: official tag or inspection status found and quoted with date and authority
no public official tag/status answer found
not_enough_if_only_found: inspection happened but no result or tag is stated
limitations: News can be a lead but not the sole support for a serious tag/status answer.
Old inspection status may not answer the latest status question.
forbidden_claims: fit for occupancy beyond official language
manual_follow_up_triggers: no public official tag/status for the exact target
earthquake event or affected portion is unclear
only news or operator statements were found

scope_reality.question: If the building was yellow-tagged, red-tagged, damaged, closed, or restricted, has it later been officially cleared?
primary_source_types: accepted final inspection or repair/retrofit completion record
post-event structural stability or soundness certificate

example_sources.name: Davao City tagged buildings compliance notice
example_sources.access_notes: Official language on restrictions, repair methodology, repair permit, and clearance before reoccupancy.

example_sources.name: DPWH Department Order No. 027 s. 2023
example_sources.access_notes: Provides placard context, not target-specific clearance.

required_user_inputs: previous damage, tag, closure, or restriction event
expected_public_result_shape: official clearance or accepted repair/retrofit completion found
engineering stability certificate found with caveat
no public official clearance answer found
not_enough_if_only_found: repair permit without completion or clearance
old green tag before the relevant event
limitations: A repair or retrofit permit alone does not prove clearance.
A structural certificate without official reoccupancy language must be reported with caveat.
forbidden_claims: fit for occupancy beyond the document scope
no restrictions unless the authority says so
manual_follow_up_triggers: no public clearance or updated tag for the exact target
previous tag or damage event is unclear
only reopening or operator statements were found

ecc_review.objective: Lock source reality for the four earthquake audit questions before evidence collection starts.
eval: forbidden claims block safety and compliance overclaims
human_boundary: user must choose the audit question
manual records require human request to custodian
safety_risks: generic standards treated as target proof
missing public evidence treated as unsafe or noncompliant
ecc_review.handoff: Gate 3 may search only the locked scope and must preserve these source-reality limits.
ecc_review.overclaim_boundary: This matrix never certifies safety, NSCP compliance, legal compliance, or fitness for occupancy.
